pr.title: Tidy up root directory for real
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Repository cleanup PR that moved root-level project documents and helper scripts into more appropriate subdirectories, then adjusted paths so docs generation and scripts still worked from their new locations. The main changes were relocating README and CONTRIBUTING into .github, moving GETTING_STARTED.md and images under docs, moving shell utilities and asm-differ settings under tools, adding Doxygen page/image configuration, and making scripts cd to the repo root before operating.

key_files.role: README moved out of root; Getting Started link updated to generated GitHub Pages documentation.
CONTRIBUTING.md moved from repository root into GitHub metadata directory.
Getting Started guide moved under docs and updated for Doxygen/GitHub Pages, current examples, m2ctx context generation, and Discord/Trello wording.
Documentation image moved from root images directory into docs image directory.
Configured IMAGE_PATH to docs/img so Doxygen can find moved images.
asmdiff script moved into tools and made to pushd to repo root before referencing baserom.dol and build output.
build script moved into tools and adjusted to pushd to repository root with quieter pushd/popd output.
gen script moved into tools, given an env bash shebang, and adjusted to run from repo root.
issues script switched from /bin/sh to env bash and wrapped in repo-root pushd/popd.
resync script moved into tools, given bash shebang, and made repo-root relative.
helper script shebang changed from /bin/sh to /usr/bin/env bash, matching bash-specific function syntax.
asm-differ settings moved from repository root into the tool-specific directory.

what_changed: Moved root-level README.md to .github/README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md to .github/CONTRIBUTING.md.
Moved GETTING_STARTED.md to docs/getting_started.md and added a Doxygen page directive: @page getting_started Getting Started.
Moved images/compilation_diagram.png to docs/img/compilation_diagram.png and updated Doxyfile IMAGE_PATH from empty to docs/img.
Updated Getting Started documentation to use the current GET_FIGHTER macro in the example instead of getFighter.
Updated the Getting Started decomp.me scratch link from VP0Gj to Mkmnx and replaced an old gist context link with https://doldecomp.github.io/melee/ctx.html.
Added guidance for generating local context with m2ctx via python3 tools/m2ctx/m2ctx.py -h.
Added a concrete grep example for checking whether a function label such as func_8007B8CC already has a C implementation.
Moved asmdiff.sh, build.sh, gen.sh, and resync.sh from the repo root into tools/.
Adjusted moved shell scripts to determine the repository root from their own path and pushd there before running commands that expect root-relative paths.
Changed several scripts to use #!/usr/bin/env bash and hid pushd/popd output with >/dev/null.
smart_moves: The cleanup did not only rename files; it preserved behavior by making scripts enter the repo root before using paths like baserom.dol, build/ssbm.us.1.2/main.dol, src, asm, and generated output paths.
Using $(dirname "$(readlink -f $0)")/.. lets tools be invoked from arbitrary working directories after being moved under tools/.
Updating Doxyfile IMAGE_PATH at the same time as moving the image prevented documentation rendering from breaking.
The docs move was paired with Doxygen-friendly formatting and GitHub Pages links, making the beginner guide easier to publish rather than merely relocating it.
Switching /bin/sh to /usr/bin/env bash matched the scripts' bash-specific syntax, especially function definitions and parameter expansion.
decomp_lessons: When cleaning the repository root, update every root-relative script assumption at the same time as the move; decomp workflows often depend on fixed paths for baserom, build artifacts, asm, src, and context files.
Documentation examples should track current project idioms: this PR updates the beginner example to use GET_FIGHTER rather than the older getFighter spelling.
For onboarding docs, prefer stable project-hosted context links such as doldecomp.github.io/melee/ctx.html over ad hoc gist links when explaining decomp.me setup.
Beginner decomp instructions should include both workflow guidance and practical search commands, such as grep -rn for checking whether a function label already exists in src.
Doxygen page migration requires both content-side directives like @page and config-side asset paths like IMAGE_PATH.
naming_conventions: Use GET_FIGHTER(fighter_gobj) in documentation examples rather than getFighter(fighter_gobj), reflecting the current macro-style fighter accessor.
Documentation directory convention shown here: docs/getting_started.md for pages and docs/img/ for images.
Tooling directory convention shown here: shell helper scripts live under tools/, and asm-differ-specific configuration lives under tools/asm-differ/.
Function-label examples keep the decomp symbol style func_8007B8CC.
Shell scripts in this repo should use #!/usr/bin/env bash when they rely on bash behavior.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: The updated onboarding text reiterates the project goal: write C that compiles to a 100% PowerPC assembly match.
The guide explains using decomp.me with Platform "GameCube / Wii" and preset "Super Smash Bros. Melee" for scratch work.
The guide points users to the generated context page and local m2ctx generation for decomp.me context setup.
The asmdiff helper still uses powerpc-eabi-objdump with Gekko options to dump slices of baserom.dol and build/ssbm.us.1.2/main.dol and compare them with diff -u --color=always.
The changed docs encourage checking labels in src with grep before starting work to avoid duplicating already-decompiled functions.

review_feedback.note: No review comments were present in the provided PR context; there was one review but no excerpted feedback.
The PR body only says "idk what I did to #730", suggesting this was a corrected or replacement cleanup attempt, but the provided context does not include details of #730.

searchable_terms: Tidy up root directory for real
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching tools/build.sh or tools/gen.sh to see whether the repo-root pushd pattern remained stable.
Search for subsequent documentation PRs that update docs/getting_started.md after the Doxygen migration.
Inspect PR #730 if available to understand what issue this PR was correcting or replacing.
Check later asm-differ tooling changes under tools/asm-differ for conventions introduced by moving diff_settings.py.
